name: Crawfish Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onions, garlic, bell pepper, and celery in butter until limp.
2. Add tomato sauce, crawfish, and parsley. Cook slowly for 10 minutes.
3. Turn off heat. Stir in bread crumbs, salt, pepper, egg, and milk.
4. Pour into prepared pie plate. Bake at 350°F for 35 to 40 minutes.
5. If you don't care for the delicious mud bugs, substitute shrimp.
